import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Current state
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    # Next state
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)
    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Front cell in next state
    dir_n = next_state.agent.direction
    front_dy_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_dx_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_n = ay_n + front_dy_n
    front_x_n = ax_n + front_dx_n

    # Front cell in current state
    dir_s = state.agent.direction
    front_dy_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_dx_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_s = ay_s + front_dy_s
    front_x_s = ax_s + front_dx_s

    # Success: pyramid on grid, not held, adjacent to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    already_success_s = pyr_on_grid_s & (~holding_s) & (dist_pyr_sq_s >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_s <= 1.5)

    # ---- POTENTIAL-BASED REWARD SHAPING ----
    # Define phi(state) as a potential capturing progress
    # Phase 1 (not holding): phi = -dist(agent, pyramid)
    # Phase 2 (holding): phi = -dist(front_cell, square)  [want front cell adjacent to square]
    # Phase 3 (placed adjacent): phi = large constant

    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)

    # Distance from front cell to square
    dist_front_sq_s = jnp.abs(front_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(front_x_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_front_sq_n = jnp.abs(front_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(front_x_n - sq_x_n)

    # Also agent-to-square distance for phase 2 backup signal
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)

    # Phase 1: approach pyramid when not holding
    phase1_s = (~holding_s).astype(jnp.float32)
    phase1_n = (~holding_n).astype(jnp.float32)
    not_holding_both = phase1_s * phase1_n
    r_approach_pyr = not_holding_both * (dist_agent_pyr_s - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist * 3.0

    # Pickup bonus - strong signal for picking up pyramid
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    # Phase 2: holding - guide front cell to be adjacent to square
    holding_both = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32) * holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Primary: reduce front-cell distance to square
    r_front_sq = holding_both * (dist_front_sq_s - dist_front_sq_n) / max_dist * 4.0

    # Secondary: also reduce agent-to-square distance
    r_agent_sq = holding_both * (dist_agent_sq_s - dist_agent_sq_n) / max_dist * 2.0

    # Bonus when front cell is adjacent to square while holding (ready to place)
    front_adj_sq_n = holding_n & (dist_front_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_front_sq_n <= 1.5)
    r_ready = front_adj_sq_n.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # Putdown reward
    placed_adj = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    placed_close = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 3.0)
    placed_far = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 3.0)

    r_putdown = (
        placed_adj.astype(jnp.float32) * 15.0
        + placed_close.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0
        + placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-2.0)
    )

    # Success reward - large sparse bonus
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 30.0

    # Persistent reward when already successful (keeps signal positive at terminal)
    r_persist = already_success_s.astype(jnp.float32) * 10.0

    # Small time penalty to encourage efficiency
    r_time = jnp.float32(-0.01)

    total = (
        r_approach_pyr
        + r_pickup
        + r_front_sq
        + r_agent_sq
        + r_ready
        + r_putdown
        + r_success
        + r_persist
        + r_time
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
